anchor_protocol: CRITICAL: Do not read, inject, or process anchor data values unless the exact Key string matches a verbatim noun mentioned in the current player prompt, immediate location state, or active quest tracking.

anchors.<STRING: EXACT_PROPER_NOUN_NPC_NAME>: NPC. <RACE> <CLASS/ROLE>. Disposition: <DISPOSITION>. Secret motive: <HIDDEN_GOAL>. Key relationship: <FACTION/NPC>. Immediate physical tell or defining equipment piece.
anchors.<STRING: EXACT_PROPER_NOUN_LOCATION_NAME: LOCATION. <REGION/ZONE>. Origin/Age: <HISTORICAL_ERA>. Current occupying force: <FACTION/MONSTERS>. Hidden spatial attribute: <SECRET_DOOR_TRAP_OR_RESOURCE>.
anchors.<STRING: EXACT_PROPER_NOUN_ITEM_OR_ARTIF: ITEM. <TYPE/RARITY>. Mechanical curse or attunement perk: <STATS>. Hidden lore: <HISTORICAL_OR_FACTION_VALUE>. Current location or missing component clue.
